meta.title: MetaTrader 5 Error Code Reference
meta.description: Structured reference of MT5/MQL5 trade return codes, runtime errors, and fixes for algorithmic trading systems.

categories.trade_return: Codes returned by OrderSend() / trade request operations (10000-10030+)
categories.runtime: MQL5 runtime errors during Expert Advisor execution (0-10000)
categories.connection: Terminal and broker connection related errors
categories.market: Market condition errors that prevent order execution

errors.name: No Error
errors.cause: Normal execution. No error occurred.
errors.fix: No action required.

errors.name: Unexpected Internal Error
errors.description: Unexpected internal error in the MQL5 environment.
errors.cause: An internal terminal or MQL5 runtime error with no specific cause. Rare.
errors.fix: Restart the MetaTrader 5 terminal. Check for terminal updates. Contact your broker if it persists.

errors.name: Wrong Internal Parameter
errors.description: Wrong parameter in the internal call of the client terminal function.
errors.cause: Usually caused by a bug in MQL5 source code passing invalid arguments to internal functions.
errors.fix: Review function calls. Ensure parameter types match expected types. Check MQL5 documentation for function signatures.

errors.name: Invalid Parameter
errors.description: Wrong parameter when calling the system function.
errors.cause: A system function was called with an out-of-range or invalid parameter.
errors.fix: Validate all inputs before passing to system functions. Check array indices and string lengths.

errors.name: Not Enough Memory
errors.description: Not enough memory for program execution.
errors.cause: The EA or script is consuming too much memory. Large arrays, deep recursion, or memory leaks.
errors.fix: Reduce array sizes. Avoid unbounded recursion. Free resources explicitly. Profile memory usage with the MQL5 profiler.

errors.name: Structure or Class with Object
errors.description: Structure or class contains objects of classes that do not allow copying.
errors.cause: Attempting to copy a structure that contains non-copyable objects (e.g. objects with dynamic memory).
errors.fix: Use pointers for complex objects in structures. Implement copy constructors where needed.

errors.name: Invalid Array
errors.description: Invalid array. Wrong size of the array, exceeding array bounds.
errors.cause: Array index out of bounds or incorrect array size in function calls.
errors.fix: Check array sizes before access. Use ArraySize() to validate. Use ArrayResize() to ensure correct dimensions.

errors.name: Array Resize Error
errors.description: Not enough memory for array reallocation.
errors.cause: ArrayResize() failed because the system cannot allocate the requested memory.
errors.fix: Reduce the requested array size. Free other arrays that are no longer needed. Check available system memory.

errors.name: String Resize Error
errors.description: Not enough memory for string reallocation.
errors.cause: String concatenation or manipulation ran out of memory.
errors.fix: Avoid building very long strings in loops. Use StringConcatenate() carefully and pre-allocate where possible.

errors.name: Account Disabled
errors.cause: The trading account has been disabled by the broker.
errors.fix: Contact your broker to enable the account. This is not an EA issue.

errors.name: Invalid Account
errors.cause: The account number is invalid or the account does not exist on the server.
errors.fix: Verify account credentials and server address. Re-login to the terminal with correct credentials.

errors.name: Trade Timeout
errors.cause: The trade request was sent but no response received from the broker server within the timeout period.
errors.fix: Check internet connection and server latency. Verify if the order was executed by checking OrdersHistoryTotal(). Implement order confirmation logic to check if the order exists before resending.

errors.name: Invalid Price
errors.cause: The price specified in the trade request is invalid (zero, negative, or too far from market).
errors.fix: Always use SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) for buy orders and SYMBOL_BID for sell orders at the time of order submission. Do not cache prices.

errors.name: Invalid Stops
errors.cause: StopLoss or TakeProfit levels are too close to the current price, below the broker's minimum stop level.
errors.fix: Check minimum stop level: SymbolInfoInteger(symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_STOPS_LEVEL). Ensure SL/TP are at least this many points away from the current price.

errors.name: Invalid Trade Volume
errors.cause: The lot size is invalid — not between SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN and SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX, or not a multiple of SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP.
errors.fix: Use NormalizeDouble(lots, 2) and clamp: lots = MathMax(minLot, MathMin(maxLot, lots)). Check: SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN/MAX/STEP).

errors.name: Market Closed
errors.cause: Attempting to trade outside of market hours for the symbol. Common for stocks, indices, and some forex pairs on weekends.
errors.fix: Check market session hours: SymbolInfoSessionTrade(). Add market hour checks to your EA. Do not send orders on weekends or outside trading sessions.

errors.name: Trade Disabled
errors.cause: Trading is disabled on the account, either by the broker or by the EA setting in the terminal (AutoTrading button disabled).
errors.fix: Enable AutoTrading in the MT5 toolbar. Check account permissions: AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_ALLOWED). Verify the EA is allowed to trade: TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_TRADE_ALLOWED).

errors.name: Not Enough Money
errors.description: Not enough money to complete the request.
errors.cause: Insufficient free margin to open the position with the specified lot size.
errors.fix: Calculate required margin before trading: AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE). Reduce lot size. Add funds to the account. Implement margin check before order submission.

errors.name: Price Changed
errors.cause: The market price moved between when the EA requested the price and when the order was submitted. Common during high volatility.
errors.fix: This is normal during fast markets. Use ORDER_TYPE_BUY / ORDER_TYPE_SELL (market orders) instead of limit orders when immediacy is required. Implement retry logic.

errors.name: Off Quotes
errors.cause: The symbol has no active market quotes. Happens during weekend, outside trading hours, or when the broker's feed is disconnected.
errors.fix: Check if market is active with SymbolInfoInteger(symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE). Wait for quotes to resume. Add connectivity and session checks to the EA.

errors.name: Broker Busy
errors.cause: The broker's trade server is temporarily overloaded and cannot process the request.
errors.fix: Implement retry with delay (e.g. Sleep(1000) then retry). Do not spam the server. Check broker status page if this occurs frequently.

errors.name: Requote
errors.cause: The price has moved since the request was made and the broker is offering a new price (requote).
errors.fix: Set slippage tolerance in the trade request (deviation field). Use ORDER_FILLING_IOC or ORDER_FILLING_FOK based on broker requirements. Consider increasing slippage allowance.

errors.name: Order Locked
errors.cause: The order cannot be modified or closed because it is currently being processed.
errors.fix: Wait for the order to finish processing before attempting modification. Implement retry logic with a short delay.

errors.name: Long Positions Only Allowed
errors.cause: The account or symbol only permits long (buy) positions. Short selling is not allowed.
errors.fix: Check account type and symbol restrictions. Some retail accounts and certain instruments (e.g. OTC stocks) may not allow shorting.

errors.name: Too Many Requests
errors.cause: The EA is sending too many trade requests to the server in a short time.
errors.fix: Add delays between trade requests (Sleep()). Use a flag to prevent order spamming in OnTick(). Process trade events in OnTradeTransaction() instead of checking every tick.

errors.name: Modification Denied
errors.description: Modification denied because an order or position is too close to market.
errors.cause: Attempting to modify SL/TP to a level that violates the broker's minimum stop level.
errors.fix: Check SYMBOL_TRADE_STOPS_LEVEL and SYMBOL_TRADE_FREEZE_LEVEL before modifying. Ensure new SL/TP meet minimum distance requirements.

errors.name: Trade Context Busy
errors.cause: Another trade operation is in progress. MT5 allows only one trade operation at a time.
errors.fix: Use IsTradeAllowed() to check before sending orders. Use a semaphore or flag to serialize trade requests. In MQL5, use Expert Advisor's OnTradeTransaction for confirmation.

errors.name: Expiration Denied
errors.cause: The broker does not allow pending orders with expiration times.
errors.fix: Remove the expiration time from the trade request (set order_expiration to 0). Use ORDER_TIME_GTC instead of ORDER_TIME_SPECIFIED.

errors.name: Too Many Orders
errors.description: The number of open and pending orders has reached the limit set by the broker.
errors.cause: Broker-side limit on the number of simultaneously open or pending orders has been reached.
errors.fix: Close or cancel some existing orders before opening new ones. Check the limit in account settings. Implement order count checks before placing new orders.

errors.name: Requote (Trade Return Code)
errors.description: Requote — the price has changed, new price offered.
errors.cause: Market moved between request and server processing.
errors.fix: Resend with the new price. Increase deviation in the trade request for market orders.

errors.name: Request Rejected
errors.cause: The trade server rejected the request without a specific reason.
errors.fix: Check trade request parameters. Verify account permissions and market conditions. Log the full MqlTradeRequest and MqlTradeResult for debugging.

errors.name: Request Cancelled
errors.cause: The trader or automated system cancelled the request before processing.
errors.fix: No action needed if intentional. Check EA logic if this is unexpected.

errors.name: Order Placed
errors.cause: The order has been successfully placed on the server (for pending orders).
errors.fix: No action needed. Confirm using OrderSelect() or OnTradeTransaction().

errors.name: Request Done
errors.cause: Trade operation completed as requested.
errors.fix: No action needed. Confirm order/position using PositionSelect() or HistoryOrderSelect().

errors.name: Request Done Partially
errors.cause: Only part of the requested volume was executed. Common with ORDER_FILLING_RETURN fill mode.
errors.fix: Check actual filled volume in MqlTradeResult.volume. Decide whether to send a follow-up order for the remaining volume.

errors.name: Request Processing Error
errors.cause: A generic error during server-side order processing.
errors.fix: Log the full result for debugging. Check MqlTradeResult.comment for additional details. Verify all trade request fields are valid.

errors.name: Request Timed Out
errors.cause: The request was not processed within the allowed time.
errors.fix: Check connectivity. Verify if the order was placed by checking order history before resending to avoid duplicate orders.

errors.name: Invalid Request
errors.cause: The MqlTradeRequest structure contains invalid field values.
errors.fix: Validate all fields in MqlTradeRequest. Log the full request for debugging. Check symbol, volume, price, sl, tp, type, and action fields.

errors.name: Invalid Volume in Request
errors.cause: Volume (lot size) does not meet broker requirements.
errors.fix: Normalize volume to valid step: volume = MathFloor(rawLots / lotStep) * lotStep. Check SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN, MAX, STEP.

errors.name: Invalid Price in Request
errors.cause: The price in the trade request is invalid or stale.
errors.fix: Refresh price from SymbolInfoDouble() immediately before order submission.

errors.name: Invalid Stops in Request
errors.cause: SL/TP too close to the current price or violates broker stop levels.
errors.fix: Use SYMBOL_TRADE_STOPS_LEVEL to calculate minimum SL/TP distance. Add buffer: stops_level * point * 2.

errors.name: Trade Disabled for Symbol
errors.cause: Trading is not allowed for the symbol or on the account.
errors.fix: Check SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE: SymbolInfoInteger(symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE). Mode 0 = disabled. Check AutoTrading button in terminal.

errors.name: Market Closed (Trade Return)
errors.cause: Trade sent outside of market hours.
errors.fix: Add session time checks. Use SymbolInfoSessionTrade() to get valid trading sessions before placing orders.

errors.name: No Money (Trade Return)
errors.description: Not enough money to complete the request.
errors.cause: Free margin is insufficient for the requested trade size.
errors.fix: Calculate required margin before trading. Reduce lot size. Add margin checks: AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_MARGIN_FREE).

errors.name: Price Changed (Trade Return)
errors.cause: Market moved between order creation and server processing.
errors.fix: Retry with fresh price. Use market orders with appropriate deviation setting for fast execution.

errors.name: Price Off Quotes
errors.cause: No current market quotes available for the symbol.
errors.fix: Check if the symbol has valid quotes: SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_BID). Wait for market to open or connection to be restored.

errors.name: Invalid Expiration
errors.cause: The expiration time for a pending order is in the past or not allowed by the broker.
errors.fix: Use ORDER_TIME_GTC or set expiration to a future time. Check broker's allowed expiration types.

errors.name: Order State Changed
errors.cause: The order was modified or cancelled externally while being processed.
errors.fix: Refresh order state before operating on it. Use OnTradeTransaction() to track order state changes in real time.

errors.name: Too Many Requests (Trade Return)
errors.cause: Order rate limit exceeded at the broker level.
errors.fix: Add delay between trade operations. Implement a throttle mechanism. Process one trade per OnTick() maximum.

errors.name: No Changes
errors.cause: A modification request was sent but the new values are identical to the current values.
errors.fix: Compare current order SL/TP with new values before sending modification request to avoid this.

errors.name: AutoTrading Disabled by Server
errors.cause: The broker's server has disabled automated trading, possibly due to a news event or maintenance.
errors.fix: Check broker announcements. Implement TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_TRADE_ALLOWED) and AccountInfoInteger(ACCOUNT_TRADE_ALLOWED) checks.

errors.name: AutoTrading Disabled by Client
errors.cause: The AutoTrading button in the MT5 terminal is toggled off.
errors.fix: Click the AutoTrading button in the MT5 toolbar to enable it. Check terminal permissions: TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_TRADE_ALLOWED).

errors.name: Request Locked
errors.cause: Trade context is busy with another operation.
errors.fix: Implement a trade lock mechanism. Wait and retry after a short delay.

errors.name: Order Frozen
errors.cause: The order/position is frozen because the market price is within the broker's freeze level range.
errors.fix: Wait until the price moves outside the freeze zone. Check SYMBOL_TRADE_FREEZE_LEVEL. Avoid modifying orders during high-volatility events.

errors.name: Invalid Fill Mode
errors.cause: The ORDER_FILLING type specified is not supported by the broker or symbol.
errors.fix: Check SYMBOL_FILLING_MODE to determine supported fill modes. Use ORDER_FILLING_IOC for most brokers. Test fill modes in a demo account.

errors.name: No Connection to Trade Server
errors.description: No connection with the trade server.
errors.cause: The terminal lost connection to the broker's trade server.
errors.fix: Check internet connection. Verify server address in account settings. Implement connection checks: TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_CONNECTED).

errors.name: Real Account Only
errors.description: Operation allowed only for real accounts.
errors.cause: Attempting an operation that is only permitted on live accounts, not demo accounts.
errors.fix: Test on demo where possible, but note some features (real money withdrawal, certain broker API features) are live-only.

errors.name: Pending Order Limit Reached
errors.cause: The broker's maximum number of pending orders has been reached.
errors.fix: Cancel unnecessary pending orders before placing new ones. Check the broker's pending order limit.

errors.name: Volume Limit Reached
errors.description: Volume limit of orders and positions for the symbol reached.
errors.cause: The total open volume for the symbol exceeds the broker's per-symbol or per-account limit.
errors.fix: Reduce open positions on the symbol. Check broker limits for maximum volume per symbol. Diversify across symbols if hitting limits.

errors.name: Incorrect or Prohibited Order Type
errors.cause: The order type is not allowed for this symbol or in the current market conditions.
errors.fix: Check SYMBOL_TRADE_MODE and SYMBOL_ORDER_MODE. Use only supported order types for the symbol. Some CFDs do not support all order types.

errors.name: Position Already Closed
errors.description: Position with the specified identifier has already been closed.
errors.cause: Attempting to modify or close a position that no longer exists.
errors.fix: Check PositionSelect() before operating on a position. Use OnTradeTransaction() to track position closures in real time.
